{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Well of Dreams
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Well of Dreams]] is a source of water within the habitat.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
